message:
feat(docs): add Swagger UI and ReDoc documentation endpoints

Implement interactive API documentation serving as per fastapi_rust-iw9:
- Add DocsConfig for configuring documentation endpoints
- Create swagger_ui_html() for Swagger UI page generation
- Create redoc_html() for ReDoc page generation
- Add oauth2_redirect_html() for OAuth2 authorization callbacks
- Provide response helpers for easy integration
- Support custom CDN URLs for assets
- Support Swagger UI parameters and OAuth initialization
- Add comprehensive tests (9 tests)

Configuration options:
- docs_path: Path for Swagger UI (default: /docs)
- redoc_path: Path for ReDoc (default: /redoc)
- openapi_path: Path for OpenAPI JSON (default: /openapi.json)
- swagger_ui_parameters: Custom Swagger UI config
- swagger_ui_init_oauth: OAuth initialization config

Closes: fastapi_rust-iw9

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
